title: Mandala Overflowing Bars
description: Brings the Mandala GUI style to Fuzs Overflowing Bars (and tweaks colors a bit)
body:
### Bridges Mandalas GUI style with Fuzs Overflowing Bars (also tweaks colors a teeny bit).

## Patch v0.1.0 (CURRENT)
- Tweaked overflow health color for better contrast/accessibility
- Changed armor toughness icon shape
  
![Icons v0.1.0](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/39ea6910bdc4b5c28af3078d4211ef41b944914e.png)

## Release - v0.0.1 [OUTDATED]
![Icons v0.0.1](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/e694e00a96f775a39a9ad6924769f15d90d15fff.png)
